chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD CTA No.46 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) For orders on office objection For orders on M.A. 2374/2022 For orders on CMA 2375/2022 For hearing of main case 07.11.2022 Mr. Ayatullah Khowaja advocate for applicant. ----- Learned counsel does not press this transfer application. However, he states that trial court may be directed to conclude the trial within 03 months. Order accordingly. The transfer application is disposed of in the above terms along with listed applications. JUDGE Ali Haider
